issues.detail: The skill file lacks at least two realistic demonstrations of its usage.

scenarios.name: Audit janky scrolling in a List backed by @Observable model
scenarios.rationale: Treatment categorizes the issue (invalidation storm / identity churn), narrows observation scope, stabilizes ForEach identity, and applies equatable() only when cheaper than recomputing; baseline mentions LazyVStack or .id but misses the documented invalidation fan-out and identity guidance.

scenarios.name: Diagnose CPU spike from heavy work in body
scenarios.rationale: Treatment moves heavy work out of body into derived/precomputed state, downsamples images, and follows the intake -> code-first review -> profile workflow with a structured report; baseline jumps to caching without the documented workflow or remediation hierarchy.
